description: 扩展黄金样本集 — 80+ 典型 GitHub AI 项目，覆盖 5 大类型 + 8 blocked cases，用于 Phase 6 评分校准。

cases.name: browser-use
cases.description: Make websites accessible for AI agents. Automate tasks online with ease.
cases.readme:
## Installation

pip install browser-use

## Quick Start

```python
from browser_use import Agent
agent = Agent(task='Search for latest AI news')
await agent.run()
```

## Demo

![demo](https://github.com/browser-use/browser-use/raw/main/demo.gif)

## Use Cases

- Web automation for business workflows
- Competitor monitoring and GEO analysis
- Automate repetitive browser tasks
cases.reason: 浏览器自动化=AI从聊天走向执行，可直接讲外贸/竞品/GEO/企业流程自动化场景

cases.name: ragflow
cases.description: RAGFlow is an open-source RAG engine based on deep document understanding.
cases.readme:
## RAGFlow — Deep Document Understanding RAG Engine

### What is RAGFlow?

RAGFlow是一个基于深度文档理解的开源RAG引擎。

### Installation

```bash
docker-compose up -d
```

### Features

- 企业知识库问答
- 客服自动化
- 内部文档检索
- Multi-format document parsing

### Demo

Try the live demo at demo.ragflow.io

### Enterprise Use Cases

- 企业知识库
- 客服系统
- 内部培训
cases.reason: RAG企业知识库=AI-FDE核心场景，适合企业落地/降本增效/公众号深度拆解

cases.name: firecrawl
cases.description: The API to search, scrape, and interact with the web at scale.
cases.readme:
## Firecrawl

Turn websites into LLM-ready data.

### Installation

```bash
npm install @mendable/firecrawl
```

### Quick Start

```javascript
const app = new FirecrawlApp({ apiKey: 'YOUR_API_KEY' });
const result = await app.scrapeUrl('https://example.com');
```

### Features

- Web scraping at scale
- AI-powered extraction
- Search integration
- API access
cases.reason: 网页抓取+AI搜索=GEO/外贸场景强相关，API服务可讲商业延展

cases.name: servers
cases.description: Model Context Protocol Servers — official reference implementations.
cases.readme:
## MCP Servers

Reference implementations of Model Context Protocol servers.

### What is MCP?

MCP is an open protocol that enables AI models to securely connect with external tools and data sources.

### Available Servers

- Filesystem
- GitHub
- Google Drive
- PostgreSQL
- Slack

### Quick Start

```bash
npx @modelcontextprotocol/server-<name>
```
cases.reason: MCP协议=AI工具调用标准，AI-FDE生态价值高，适合公众号方法论拆解

cases.name: gemini-cli
cases.description: An open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.
cases.readme:
## Gemini CLI

An open-source AI agent that brings Gemini directly into your terminal.

### Installation

```bash
npm install -g @google/gemini-cli
```

### Quick Start

```bash
gemini "explain this codebase"
```

### Features

- Open source
- Bring your own API key
- MCP tool integration
- Terminal-native experience
cases.reason: AI Agent CLI工具，可运行可演示，适合短视频展示

cases.description: Prefect is a workflow orchestration framework for building resilient data pipelines in Python.
cases.readme:
## Prefect

Workflow orchestration for data pipelines.

### Installation
pip install prefect

### Quick Start
```python
from prefect import flow, task
```

### Architecture
- Task-based flows
- Cloud orchestration
- Retry and error handling

### Enterprise
- Prefect Cloud
- Self-hosted server
- RBAC

cases.name: milvus
cases.description: Milvus is a high-performance, cloud-native vector database built for scalable similarity search and AI applications.
cases.readme:
## Milvus — Vector Database

Cloud-native vector database for AI.

### Installation
docker-compose up -d

### Quick Start
```python
from pymilvus import Collection
```

### Architecture
- Distributed
- GPU-accelerated
- Multiple index types

### Enterprise
- Cloud-native
- Kubernetes
- Multi-replica

cases.name: haystack
cases.description: Haystack is an open source NLP framework to build LLM applications with an orchestration pipeline.
cases.readme:
## Haystack — NLP Framework

Build production-ready LLM applications.

### Installation
pip install haystack-ai

### Quick Start
```python
from haystack import Pipeline
```

### Architecture
- Component-based pipeline
- RAG pipelines
- Agent pipelines

### Enterprise
- Self-hosted
- API endpoints
- Custom components

cases.name: DeepFaceLab
cases.description: DeepFaceLab is the leading software for creating deepfakes. Face swapping tool for videos.
cases.readme:
## DeepFaceLab — Deepfake Creation

Leading software for creating deepfakes.

### Installation
Follow setup guide.

### Usage
Swap faces in videos with deep learning.

### Warning
This software can be used to create deceptive content.

cases.name: roop
cases.description: One-click deepfake (face swap). Take a video and replace the face with just one image.
cases.readme:
## Roop — One-Click Deepfake

Replace faces in videos with one click.

### Installation
pip install roop

### Usage
Select video and target face image. Click run.

### Warning
Be responsible. Face swapping without consent is illegal in many jurisdictions.

cases.name: Real-Time-Voice-Cloning
cases.description: Clone a voice in 5 seconds to generate arbitrary speech in real-time. Voice deepfake tool.
cases.readme:
## Real-Time Voice Cloning

Clone a voice in 5 seconds.

### Installation
pip install -r requirements.txt

### Usage
Record 5 seconds of voice, generate arbitrary speech.

### Warning
Voice cloning can be used for impersonation and fraud.

cases.name: BlackEye-Phishing

### Enterprise
